steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content:
Left side of blank: independent clause (Lucia Macchia of the University of Oxford studies socioeconomic X)
Right side of blank: independent clause (other researchers investigate areas such as organizational behavior and personal finance)

steps.title: Apply the transition word rule
steps.content: A transition phrase connecting two independent clauses requires a semicolon before it and a comma after it (IC; for instance, IC). Choice B demonstrates this: “inequality; for instance, other researchers...” Choices A, C, and D violate this rule by misplacing the semicolon or using only commas. That matches choice B — B is correct.
